Arctic unit-area biome map
Biome: arctic
Unit resolution: 1x1 world units
Focus bounds x:[2, 56) z:[2, 56)
Exact biome edges: west x=2, east x=56, north z=2, south z=56
Sample region x:[2, 68) z:[2, 68)  neighbor margin:12

Visible biome slices
  Arctic   focus    x:[2, 56) z:[2, 56)
  Radar    neighbor x:[56, 68) z:[2, 56)
  Jungle   neighbor x:[2, 56) z:[56, 68)
  Citadel  neighbor x:[56, 68) z:[56, 68)

Object legend
  A Arctic/arch
  B Arctic/boulder
  d Arctic/drift
  f Arctic/fragment
  G Arctic/glacier
  M Arctic/mountain
  O Arctic/overhang
  P Arctic/pool
  H Arctic/shelf
  S Arctic/spire
  C Jungle/bushy
  T Jungle/canopy
  E Jungle/edgeTree
  D Jungle/fern
  F Jungle/giant
  b Radar/beacon
  I Radar/bunker
  J Radar/dish
  L Radar/lane
  * mixed unit (multiple object kinds overlap in the same 1x1 cell)
  . empty unit
